brief.title: Marketing & Advertising Performance Dashboard
brief.business_goals: Analyze audience segmentation and engagement metrics
brief.data_context: Data sourced from internal marketing & advertising systems. Updated daily. Covers the last 12 months with historical comparison.

recommendation.context_summary: This dashboard serves Operations Team Leads in the Marketing & Advertising sector. The primary goal is to analyze audience segmentation and engagement metrics. Data is refreshed daily, and users have advanced / expert data literacy. The design prioritizes clarity and actionability.

kpi_task_chart_mapping.rationale: Heatmap is well-suited for 'Monitor trend over time' with Campaign ROI.
Area Chart is well-suited for 'Compare across categories' with Cost per Acquisition.
KPI Card / Scorecard is well-suited for 'Track against target' with Click-Through Rate.

layout_hierarchy.pattern: Full-width header with KPI cards. Below: tabbed sections for different analysis views.
layout_hierarchy.primary_section: KPI scorecards for Campaign ROI, Cost per Acquisition
layout_hierarchy.secondary_section: Trend analysis for Campaign ROI over time

labels_scales_colors.color_palette: Financial Navy (#1A237E) with gold (#FFD700) highlights and traffic-light status indicators
labels_scales_colors.axis_labels: Always label axes with units (e.g., Revenue in EUR, Time in Days)
labels_scales_colors.number_format: K/M suffix for large numbers; 1 decimal for percentages
labels_scales_colors.scale_type: Linear for most KPIs; logarithmic if data spans multiple orders of magnitude
labels_scales_colors.legend: Include legend only when comparing 3+ series; use direct labeling otherwise
labels_scales_colors.accessibility: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio; do not rely on color alone

primary_interactions: Date range picker (last 7/30/90 days)
Drill-down from summary to detail
Hover tooltips with exact values
interactions.filter_defaults: Default view: last 30 days, all segments

design_rationales.audience_adaptation: For advanced / expert users: provide drill-down and advanced filters.
design_rationales.update_frequency_impact: With daily updates, include a prominent 'last updated' timestamp.
design_rationales.chart_selection_principle: Charts selected based on primary user task: trend -> line chart; comparison -> bar chart; part-to-whole -> pie/donut; single value -> KPI card.
design_rationales.cognitive_load: Limit to 5-7 visual elements per screen. Group related KPIs with whitespace and section headers.

brief.title: Energy & Utilities Performance Dashboard
brief.business_goals: Monitor energy consumption and peak demand
brief.data_context: Data sourced from internal energy & utilities systems. Updated weekly. Covers the last 12 months with historical comparison.

recommendation.context_summary: This dashboard serves Operations Team Leads in the Energy & Utilities sector. The primary goal is to monitor energy consumption and peak demand. Data is refreshed weekly, and users have intermediate data literacy. The design prioritizes clarity and actionability.

kpi_task_chart_mapping.rationale: Gauge Chart is well-suited for 'Monitor trend over time' with Outage Frequency.
Pie Chart is well-suited for 'Compare across categories' with Mean Time to Restore.
Funnel Chart is well-suited for 'Track against target' with Cost per kWh.

layout_hierarchy.pattern: Left sidebar: navigation/filters. Main area: hero chart at top, 2x2 grid of supporting charts.
layout_hierarchy.primary_section: KPI scorecards for Outage Frequency, Mean Time to Restore
layout_hierarchy.secondary_section: Trend analysis for Outage Frequency over time

labels_scales_colors.color_palette: Neutral Grey background with teal accents (#008080) and amber warnings (#FFA500)
labels_scales_colors.axis_labels: Always label axes with units (e.g., Revenue in EUR, Time in Days)
labels_scales_colors.number_format: K/M suffix for large numbers; 1 decimal for percentages
labels_scales_colors.scale_type: Linear for most KPIs; logarithmic if data spans multiple orders of magnitude
labels_scales_colors.legend: Include legend only when comparing 3+ series; use direct labeling otherwise
labels_scales_colors.accessibility: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio; do not rely on color alone

primary_interactions: Cross-filtering: clicking one chart filters all others
Export to PDF/Excel
Bookmark current view
interactions.filter_defaults: Default view: last 30 days, all segments

design_rationales.audience_adaptation: For intermediate users: balance simplicity with analytical depth.
design_rationales.update_frequency_impact: With weekly updates, include a prominent 'last updated' timestamp.
design_rationales.chart_selection_principle: Charts selected based on primary user task: trend -> line chart; comparison -> bar chart; part-to-whole -> pie/donut; single value -> KPI card.
design_rationales.cognitive_load: Limit to 5-7 visual elements per screen. Group related KPIs with whitespace and section headers.

Gauge Chart is well-suited for 'Track against target' with Warehouse Utilization.
